label: Prismwound Asteroid
description: Prismwound Asteroid is a dark, glass-skinned body trapped in Vesper Node’s polyhedral traffic of orbits, its rotation locked to the luminous filaments that cage the system. A continuous cleft splits the stone along a clean geometric chord, its walls vitrified into faceted planes that catch the stratified radiance in hard, spectral bands. The surface bears shallow, rule-straight terraces and pressure ridges aligned to the Hollow Lattice’s tensile lines, giving the rock the appearance of a quarried monument rather than a natural remnant. Along the cleft’s lip, lightless intervals pool in stable sheets, producing a persistent, measurable shadow that resists drift and scatter.
